response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with exposure to AI-agent workflows and cloud technologies, aligning well with core requirements. However, his direct experience with production-grade GenAI solutions and RAG architectures is less explicitly documented, warranting further exploration in an interview.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development with TypeScript, Python-adjacent languages (Node.js), and cloud platforms (AWS).
Proven leadership in technical tooling and infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Strong background in designing scalable systems, data pipelines, and open-source GIS platforms, indicating adaptability to complex technical challenges.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, with only recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure.
No direct evidence of expertise in vector databases or retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures in resume.
While customer-facing, his leadership experience appears more hands-on technical than strategic (e.g., leading discovery sessions with stakeholders).
